description: My car was parked in my driveway during a hailstorm on June 12th. The hood, roof, and trunk have multiple dents, and the windshield is cracked. No other vehicles were involved.
resolution_notes: Comprehensive coverage applied; hail damage is a covered peril under comprehensive auto coverage. Deductible applied, repair estimate approved.

description: My teenage son borrowed my car without permission and got into a collision with a parked vehicle. He does not have a driver's license yet.
resolution_notes: Claim denied under the unlicensed/unauthorized driver exclusion clause. Policyholder advised to review named-driver endorsement options.

description: A pipe burst in the upstairs bathroom while we were on vacation, causing water damage to the ceiling and flooring below. We discovered it three days after returning home.
resolution_notes: Sudden and accidental water discharge is covered; however, mold remediation costs were partially excluded due to delayed discovery. Adjuster requested moisture inspection report.

description: Heavy rainfall caused a nearby river to overflow, flooding our basement with about two feet of water and damaging furniture and electronics.
resolution_notes: Standard homeowners policy excludes flood/surface water damage; requires separate flood insurance policy (e.g., NFIP). Claim redirected to flood policy if one exists.

description: I went to the ER after experiencing chest pains. Tests showed it was a false alarm related to acid reflux. The hospital billed $4,800 for the visit.
resolution_notes: Emergency room visits for symptoms suggesting a medical emergency are covered under the prudent layperson standard, regardless of final diagnosis.

description: I want to get cosmetic rhinoplasty and am submitting a claim to see if my plan will cover any portion of the procedure.
resolution_notes: Elective cosmetic procedures not related to a covered medical necessity are excluded under the policy's cosmetic surgery exclusion clause.

description: My car was stolen from a public parking garage downtown two nights ago. I filed a police report and have the case number. The vehicle has not been recovered.
resolution_notes: Comprehensive coverage includes theft. Police report and comprehensive coverage confirmed; payout based on actual cash value minus deductible.

description: Someone broke into my home while I was away and stole jewelry I recently appraised at $45,000, but I don't have receipts and there's no police report yet because I wanted to check with insurance first.
resolution_notes: Missing police report and lack of proof of ownership for high-value items flagged for further investigation before payout consideration. Policyholder advised to file police report immediately.

description: I was diagnosed with a knee condition two months before my policy started, and now I need surgery for it. I'm submitting a claim to cover the surgery cost.
resolution_notes: Treatment falls within the pre-existing condition waiting period defined in the policy. Claim excluded until the waiting period is satisfied.

description: I had an MRI done for back pain last week at a specialist's recommendation, but I didn't realize I needed pre-approval from my insurer first.
resolution_notes: Non-emergency imaging requires prior authorization per policy terms. Claim denied for missing authorization; policyholder advised to resubmit with retroactive authorization request.

description: My roommate's friend stole my laptop and headphones during a party at our apartment. I don't have a police report yet but I know who did it.
resolution_notes: Theft by a known, identifiable individual requires a police report before payout consideration. Policyholder advised to file a report to proceed.

description: A pipe under my kitchen sink leaked overnight and damaged my area rug and some electronics stored on the floor nearby.
resolution_notes: Sudden and accidental water discharge from plumbing is a covered peril under personal property coverage. Deductible applied.

description: I run a small jewelry-making business from my apartment and someone broke into my storage unit, stealing about $6,000 worth of tools and inventory.
resolution_notes: Business property and inventory used for commercial purposes are excluded under the standard renters policy. Policyholder advised to obtain a business property/inland marine policy.

description: I had to cancel my international trip two days before departure because I came down with the flu and my doctor advised against flying.
resolution_notes: Trip cancellation due to documented illness of the traveler is a covered reason under trip cancellation coverage. Medical documentation from treating physician required and provided.

description: The airline lost my checked bag on a connecting flight and it still hasn't been located after 10 days. It contained clothing and a camera worth about $900 total.
resolution_notes: Baggage loss covered subject to per-item sub-limits; camera reimbursement capped per the policy's electronics sub-limit. Airline's own baggage settlement deducted from payout to avoid duplicate recovery.

description: I broke my ankle while hiking in Portugal and needed emergency treatment and a cast at a local hospital. I paid out of pocket and am submitting for reimbursement.
resolution_notes: Emergency medical treatment abroad for an accidental injury is covered under emergency medical coverage. Itemized hospital invoice and proof of payment required and provided.

description: I was injured while paragliding during my vacation and had to be treated at a local clinic. I'm submitting the medical bills for reimbursement.
resolution_notes: Paragliding falls under the policy's extreme/adventure sports exclusion. Coverage would require a separate adventure sports endorsement, which was not purchased.

description: I was in an accident while I had my rideshare app on and was on my way to pick up a passenger. The other driver ran a red light.
resolution_notes: Vehicle use for ridesharing purposes is excluded under the standard personal auto policy absent a rideshare endorsement. Claim referred to the rideshare company's commercial policy for the period in question.

description: Heavy rain caused the main sewer line to back up into our basement through the floor drain, damaging the carpet and some stored belongings.
resolution_notes: Sewer and drain backup is excluded under the base policy unless a Water Backup Endorsement is attached. Policyholder's declarations page confirmed no such endorsement was purchased.
